name: Alex Morgan
bio: Building tools for async teams. Obsessed with developer experience and calm software.

projects.title: Slowmail
projects.description: An email client that batches your inbox into two daily digests so you can stay focused.

projects.title: OSS Changelog
projects.description: Auto-generates human-readable changelogs from your git history using AI.

name: Priya Shah
bio: Designer turned founder. Working on making financial tools less intimidating for first-generation investors.

projects.title: Pebble
projects.description: A no-jargon investing app for people who find traditional finance apps overwhelming.

name: Tom Reeves
bio: Vibe coder and part-time philosopher. Shipping weird small things to see what sticks.

projects.title: One Question
projects.description: A daily journalling app that asks you exactly one question and gets out of the way.

projects.title: Readlog
projects.description: Track what you read across formats — books, articles, papers — in one minimal place.

projects.title: Weekend Fonts
projects.description: A small shop of hand-crafted display fonts made over weekends.

name: Clara West
bio: Researcher and writer exploring the intersection of AI and organisational design.

projects.title: Org Futures
projects.description: A newsletter and research project on how AI is reshaping how teams are structured.

projects.title: Signal vs Noise
projects.description: A curated weekly digest of the most interesting writing on technology and society.
